## Tags
location, navigation, travel, drop, delete, remove, erase

## Categories
navigation, travel

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/map-minus)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MapMinus;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MapMinus { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
